messages.content: Hey anyone want to play Minecraft tonight?
Sure! Let's build a castle together
I found an amazing sushi restaurant near Gangnam station yesterday
The performance was really laggy on the server last night
We should upgrade the RAM, 8GB is not enough for modded MC
Does anyone know a good Italian place for dinner?
Try the pasta place on 5th street, their carbonara is amazing
The homework for math class is due tomorrow, anyone done it?
I finished the calculus problems but the statistics part is hard
Movie night this Friday! Let's watch Dune Part 2
I prefer horror movies, how about The Exorcist?
Just got a new graphics card, RTX 4090!
Nice! That should handle ray tracing in Minecraft shaders easily
Good morning everyone, the weather is really cold today
Yeah it's -10 degrees outside, stay warm!
Has anyone tried the new ramen shop that opened near the university?
Yes! Their tonkotsu ramen is incredible, thick and creamy broth
I need help with the Python programming assignment
What part? I can help with data structures and algorithms
The sorting algorithm implementation, merge sort is confusing
Anyone going to the BTS concert next month?
I got tickets! Section A row 3, so excited
Let's plan a trip to Jeju Island during spring break
Great idea! We can rent a car and visit Seongsan Ilchulbong
I'll book the Airbnb near Hallasan mountain, looks beautiful
The WiFi keeps disconnecting in the library, so annoying
Use the ethernet cable at desk 15, much more stable
Anyone interested in learning guitar? I can teach basics
Me! I've always wanted to play acoustic guitar
Just finished reading 1984 by Orwell, amazing book
